name: Decathlon Internal Developer Platform
onCreateCommand: sudo chown -R vscode:vscode /home/vscode/.m2 && bash -lc 'if command -v mvn >/dev/null 2>&1 && mvn -version 2>/dev/null | grep -q "Apache Maven 3.9.9"; then echo "Maven 3.9.9 already installed, skipping download"; else wget https://archive.apache.org/dist/maven/maven-3/3.9.9/binaries/apache-maven-3.9.9-bin.tar.gz -O /tmp/maven.tar.gz && sudo tar -xzf /tmp/maven.tar.gz -C /opt && sudo ln -sf /opt/apache-maven-3.9.9/bin/mvn /usr/local/bin/mvn && rm /tmp/maven.tar.gz; fi'
postStartCommand: bash -lc 'if ! docker info >/dev/null 2>&1; then sudo mkdir -p /var/run /var/lib/docker && sudo nohup dockerd >/tmp/dockerd.log 2>&1 & fi; for i in $(seq 1 30); do docker info >/dev/null 2>&1 && break; sleep 1; done; docker compose up -d'
